description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a casual urban appearance, featuring short, side-swept hair and a relaxed posture. The individual is dressed in a cropped hoodie with a graphic print on the front, paired with fitted, distressed jeans that have visible patches and rips. The jeans are detailed with various textures and patterns, adding to the streetwear style. The person is wearing open-toed sandals, which further emphasize a laid-back, everyday look suitable for city environments. The hands are relaxed at the sides, and no accessories or carried objects are visible. The overall build and proportions are realistic, with attention to clothing folds and body anatomy.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian in a cropped hoodie, distressed jeans, and sandals, with short side-swept hair and a relaxed stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cropped hoodie with a graphic print, distressed jeans with patches, and open-toed sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the cropped length of the hoodie, and the layered textures on the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the hoodie, waistband of the jeans, and the person's short hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the side profile, arm position, and additional details on the jeans' patches.
attribute_clothing_type: casual cropped hoodie and distressed fitted jeans
